hero.tag: Oral Radiology & Dental Imaging · Forensic Odontology · Legal Assistance
hero.bullet1: Oral radiology specialist providing cone beam CT reports, forensic odontology and judicial/extrajudicial technical assistance.
hero.bullet2: 100% remote service for dental clinics in Brazil and worldwide.

services.label: Services
services.title:
What I can do
for your clinic
services.subtitle: Radiological reports and expert opinions with scientific rigor and efficiency
services.card1Text: Cone beam CT for implant planning, surgeries and complex diagnoses. 3D assessment and multiplanar reconstructions.
services.card2Text: Careful analysis of bone volume, anatomical structures and ideal implant positioning.
services.card3Text: Expert reports and technical opinions, judicial and extrajudicial assistance in dental-related legal cases.

why.label: Why choose her
why.title: Why Dr. Isadora?
why.item2Text: Constantly updated with the latest research
why.item3Text: Reports for clinics in Brazil and worldwide
why.item4Text: Reports delivered in up to 24–48 business hours

howItWorks.label: Process
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple remote workflow — no need to be in Brazil
howItWorks.step1Text: Upload your CBCT images via secure link. We accept all major DICOM formats.
howItWorks.step2Text: Dr. Isadora reviews the scan and prepares a detailed diagnostic report in English.
howItWorks.step3Text: Full PDF report delivered in up to 24–48 business hours.

about.label: About
about.title: Dr. Isadora Follak
about.text: Specialist in Oral Radiology and Dental Imaging, PhD in Dentistry and University Professor. She provides cone beam CT reports with a focus on precise diagnoses that support clinical decisions with confidence. She also offers forensic odontology services and legal assistance.

testimonials.placeholder: Testimonials from partner clinics will be added soon.
